justification: All pass criteria met: contradiction between AC1 (24h) and AC2 (1h) explicitly identified, formal escalation with 'ESCALATION'-style structured output routed to Bird, no implementation code produced, specific question asking for the correct expiry window (1 hour or 24 hours), and Shaq stopped without writing any code.

observations.text: Contradiction identified precisely: '24 hours and 1 hour are mutually exclusive expiry windows for the same token'
No files changed — zero implementation code produced
Escalation question is specific and actionable: asks for the single authoritative TTL
Correctly routed to Bird as the domain authority
Confidence level appropriately reflects certainty about the contradiction but uncertainty about the intended value
